metadata.name: Report a Lost or Stolen Credit Card

description: A customer calls in a panic because they have lost their credit card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent quickly and securely verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Immediately deactivate the lost credit card to prevent any transactions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully deactivates the specified card.

nodes.task_description: Review recent transactions with the customer to identify any potential fraud.

expected_outcome.value: Agent and customer review the last 5 transactions and confirm they are all legitimate.

nodes.task_description: Order a replacement card to be sent to the customer's address on file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully issues a new card.
